heading: Effective date
label: 471 Effective date
notes: References in TextThe date of enactment of this Act, referred to in subsec. (b), probably means the date of enactment of , which enacted this chapter and was approved .Pub. L. 104–331Oct. 26, 1996

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: Except as otherwise provided in this chapter, this chapter shall take effect on .October 1, 1997

children.heading: .—Regulations
children.label: b .—Regulations
children.text: Sections 411(d), 412(c), 413(c), 414(c), 415(c), 416(c), 421(d), 425(d), 431(c), 431(d), 452(a), and 454(a) shall take effect on the date of enactment of this Act.1See References in Text note below.1
